commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: The meaning of "what the Spirit saith to the churches. "He imputes to the Ephesians "forsaken love; "

commentaries.author: Victorinus of Pettau
commentaries.content: He who falls, falls from a height: therefore He said whence: because, even to the very last, works of love must be practised; and this is the principal commandment. Finally, unless this is done, He threatened to remove their candlestick out of its place, that is, to disperse the congregation.
